item.title: Do GRC Requirements Truly Reduce Risk?
item.description: When GRC requirements tend to be more compliance based, rather than risk reduction forward, what actions can you take to facilitate better risk management?

item.title: How to Conduct Cost Optimization and Remain Cyber Safe During an Economic Downturn
item.description: Are you prepared for budget cuts, hiring freezes, or layoffs while still prioritizing cyber? Find out how to maximize your budget with security in mind.

item.title: What should cyber security’s role in sourcing and procurement be?
item.description: When SPVM teams and security teams work together when assessing vendors, risk is properly accounted for and all parties involved are informed.

item.title: Black Kite Unveils Industry’s First Monthly Ransomware Dashboards
item.description: Research offers critical insight into top ransomware groups, their victims, and the most common indicators of compromise over the past six months

item.title: The History of Ransomware: Where It’s Been and Where It’s Going
item.description: The history of ransomware begins in 1989 after a World Health Organization event. If you thought you knew ransomware, think again.

item.title: Ransomware Trends 2023: The Who, What, and Why
item.description: Keep an eye out for these key ransomware trends for 2023 so your teams can stop bad actors before they strike.

item.title: Black Kite Recognized as a Strong Performer in Gartner® Peer Insights™ & Customers’ Choice in North America Segment
item.description: Black Kite is recognized as a Strong Performer inGartner® Peer Insights™ & Customers' Choice in North America segment.

item.title: Security Luminaries Join Black Kite’s Board of Advisors
item.description: Leading security experts have joined Black Kite’s Board of Advisors, bringing deep domain knowledge and strategic vision to the company.

item.title: Fortune 500 CISO Patricia Titus Talks About Enabling Change in Cybersecurity
item.description: Check out the Risk and Reels podcast and learn how to enable change through de-prioritizing credit, building consensus, and ensuring clear communication.

item.title: What You Need to Know About Maturing Your Third-Party Risk Management Program
item.description: High-risk third parties are 2.5x more prevalent than they were just a few years ago. Discover how to start scaling your third-party risk program.

item.title: T-Mobile Hacked 6 Times in Last 4 Years
item.description: T-Mobile made yet another appearance on the list of data breach victims, putting the data of over 40 million consumers at risk.

item.title: Healthcare Ransomware Attack Led to Cancelled Surgeries and Diverted Patients – What is Next?
item.description: Memorial Health continues negotiations with hackers after all three hospitals within the health network fell victim to ransomware.

item.title: The Top Five Third-Party Data Breaches in June 2021, Revealed
item.description: Data breaches in June targeted automative manufacturers first, with both Volkswagen and Mercedes-Benz' customer data leaked, impacting millions.

item.title: Tired of Guessing Whether Your IP Addresses Are Blacklisted?
item.description: Understand the importance of IP reputation and learn how we’re enabling organizations to be cyber smart with our free IP Blacklist Search.

item.title: Four Ways Automation Can Transform Your Third-Party Cyber Risk Management Strategy
item.description: Supply chains are expected to double in size by 2026. Discover how automation can help alleviate your cybersecurity growing pains.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights on Critical Vulnerabilities in FreeScout, pac4j, MongoDB, Django, Langflow, RustFS, and Apache Superset
item.description: Expert TPRM analysis of critical vulnerabilities in FreeScout, pac4j, MongoDB, Django, Langflow, RustFS, and Apache Superset. Stay ahead of third-party risks with Black Kite.

item.title: Four Cybersecurity Tips for Navigating to a Hybrid Work Environment
item.description: Today's new work model requires new security measures. Keep your organization and your employees safe with these tips for managing a hybrid work model

item.title: Top Five Third-Party Breaches in April 2021: Hackers Bite from Apple, Airlines Hit Turbulence & More
item.description: Hackers take a bite from Apple, airlines hit turbulence and more from last month's major breaches.

item.title: How Protected Are You Against Ransomware?
item.description: By the time you're done reading this sentence, another ransomware attack will have occurred. Is your organization on the hit list?

item.title: Cyber Risk Ratings Leader NormShield Rebrands to “Black Kite”
item.description: Black Kite, the cyber risk ratings company formerly known as NormShield, today revealed its new name, logo, and headquarters.

item.title: Why Reputational Risk Matters Regardless of Company Size
item.description: We define reputational risk and most importantly – why managing reputational risk matters in the digital era regardless of company size.

item.title: Five Reasons Why Supply Chains Need Security Monitoring
item.description: Supply chains have evolved—and so have cybersecurity standards. Here are 5 reasons today's cyber ecosystems demand risk monitoring.

item.title: Are Security Rating Services Really Worth it for SMBs?
item.description: Let’s take a look at some of the security challenges SMBs face and how automation can reduce the burden.

item.title: The Evolution of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Risk
item.description: When it comes to the evolution of artificial intelligence, things are changing rapidly. Learn more about how changes can affect your org’s cyber risk.

item.title: Final Rule: SEC to Require Companies to Report Breaches in 4 Days
item.description: The SEC finalized new cybersecurity rules, requiring companies to report breaches within a matter of days. Discover what it all means here.

item.title: The Unique Risks Small Businesses Face Using Third-Party Vendors
item.description: Small businesses face a unique set of challenges regarding TPRM. Why it’s essential for them to implement a strong third-party vendor management process.

item.title: Black Kite Review: RSAC 2023
item.description: Insights on RSAC 2023 from Black Kite’s Senior Vice President and Cyber Risk Evangelist, Jeffrey Wheatman, and Head of Research, Dr. Ferhat Dikbiyik.

item.title: It’s Time to Make Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) Part of Your Daily Routine
item.description: One of the four focuses this year for cybersecurity awareness month is implementing multi-factor authentication. Let’s discuss it!

item.title: I Like Cheese – Please Stop Talking About Cost Cutting – Instead Focus On Cost Optimization
item.description: Cost cutting frequently results in dropping controls or tools and ends in losing layers of protection – how can we prioritize cost optimization?

item.title: Cybersecurity Rating vs. Penetration Testing (Pen Test)
item.description: IT leaders are responsible for keeping digital and informational assets safe and secure. Protecting employees and client data should be a priority.
